c.d: The app's ease of navigation, clarity, and overall user experience.
The effectiveness of the app's search, recommendations, and browsing features for finding new podcasts.
Available playback options such as variable speed, silence trimming, volume boost, and sleep timer.
Compatibility with different operating systems and devices (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
Ability to download episodes for listening without an internet connection.
Ease of managing podcast subscriptions and automatic downloading of new episodes.
Availability of a paid subscription or one-time purchase to remove ads.
Support for modern podcasting features like community comments, live streaming, and value-for-value payments.
The cost of the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases.
The average rating of the app based on user reviews.
